# Field Service - Sales

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:85a5f9ae96f5849fc91846cd0eb90412670a42063a94ddc3b05cfe6fb907ccab
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

The module integrates the Field Service application with the Sales one
and allows you to sell products that generate field service orders.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Installation

To install Field Service and have the mapping features, you need to
install GeoEngine.

Please refer to the installation instructions available at:
<https://github.com/OCA/geospatial/tree/13.0/base_geoengine>

## Configuration

Products must be configured properly in order to create field service
orders upon sale order confirmation.

The field service tracking of a product defines how it generates a field
service order if the product is sold via sale order.

To configure a product that generates a unique field service order on
each sale order line:

- Go to Sales > Catalog > Products
- Create or select a product
- Set the Field Service Tracking to 'One FSM Order per Sale Order Line'
- Select the FSM Order Template that will be used for creating FSM
  Orders when a Sale Order is confirmed with this product

To configure a product that generates a unique field service order for
an individual sale order:

- Go to Sales > Catalog > Products
- Create or select a product
- Set the Field Service Tracking to 'One FSM Order per Sale Order'
- Select the FSM Order Template that will be used for creating FSM
  Orders when a Sale Order is confirmed with this product

To setup a sales territory:

- Go to Field Service > Master Data > Locations
- Create or select a location
- Go to the Sales tab and select the sales territory

## Usage

- Go to Sales
- Create a new Quotation/Sale Order
- Set the FSM Location to be used
- On a Sale Order Line, select a product configured for field service
  orders
- Confirm the Sale Order
- Field Service orders linked to SO lines are created
- When a Field Service order is completed, the quantity delivered for
  its
  linked sale order line will be updated to the quantity ordered,
  indicating this line is ready for invoicing.

## Known issues / Roadmap

- Provide a mapping between an address and the branch and use it to set
  the pricelist of a new partner

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/field-service/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/field-service/issues/new?body=module:%20fieldservice_sale%0Aversion:%2018.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.

methods.name: odoo.addons.fieldservice_sale.tests.test_fsm_sale_autofill_location.FSMSale.setUpClass
documentation:
Create 3 related partners : a parent company, a child partner and
a child shipping partner.

For each test, a different partner is a fsm_location.
A SO is created with the child partner as customer. The test run
the SO's location autofill and check if the fsm_location_id
is the expected one.

methods.name: odoo.addons.fieldservice_sale.tests.test_fsm_sale_autofill_location.FSMSale.test_00_autofill_so_fsm_location
documentation:
Check location autofill from SO partner

SO partner is an FSM location linked to location 2 => expect location2
(location 1 and 3 are ignored because we want only location explicitly
linked to the partner)

methods.name: odoo.addons.fieldservice_sale.tests.test_fsm_sale_autofill_location.FSMSale.test_01_autofill_so_fsm_location
documentation:
Check location autofill from SO partner

SO partner is not an FSM location defined, but location1 is linked to
its commercial partner => expect location 1 (because of ordering)

methods.name: odoo.addons.fieldservice_sale.tests.test_fsm_sale_autofill_location.FSMSale.test_02_autofill_so_fsm_location
documentation:
Check location autofill from SO partner

SO partner is not an FSM location defined, but location1 is linked to
the partner itself => expect location 1 (because of ordering)

methods.name: odoo.addons.fieldservice_sale.tests.test_fsm_sale_autofill_location.FSMSale.test_03_autofill_so_fsm_location
documentation:
Check location autofill from SO partner

SO partner is not an FSM location defined, but location1 is linked to
its shipping partner => expect location 1 (because of ordering)

methods.name: odoo.addons.fieldservice_sale.models.sale_order.SaleOrder._compute_fsm_location_id
documentation:
Autofill the Sale Order's FS location with the partner_id,
the partner_shipping_id or the partner_id.commercial_partner_id if
they are FS locations.

methods.name: odoo.addons.fieldservice_sale.models.sale_order.SaleOrder._prepare_line_fsm_values
documentation: Prepare the values to create a new FSM Order from a sale order line.

methods.name: odoo.addons.fieldservice_sale.models.sale_order.SaleOrder._prepare_fsm_values
documentation: Prepare the values to create a new FSM Order from a sale order.

methods.name: odoo.addons.fieldservice_sale.models.sale_order.SaleOrder._field_service_generate_sale_fsm_orders
documentation: Generate the FSM Order for this sale order if it doesn't exist.

methods.name: odoo.addons.fieldservice_sale.models.sale_order.SaleOrder._field_service_generate_line_fsm_orders
documentation:
Generate FSM Orders for the given sale order lines.

Override this method to filter lines to generate FSM Orders for.

methods.name: odoo.addons.fieldservice_sale.models.sale_order.SaleOrder._field_service_generate
documentation:
Generate FSM Orders for this sale order.

Override this method to add new field_service_tracking types.

methods.name: odoo.addons.fieldservice_sale.models.sale_order.SaleOrder._field_service_generation
documentation:
Create Field Service Orders based on the products' configuration.
\:rtype: list(FSM Orders)
\:return: list of newly created FSM Orders

methods.name: odoo.addons.fieldservice_sale.models.sale_order.SaleOrder._post_fsm_message
documentation: Post messages to the Sale Order and the newly created FSM Orders

methods.name: odoo.addons.fieldservice_sale.models.sale_order.SaleOrder._action_confirm
documentation: On SO confirmation, some lines generate field service orders.

methods.name: odoo.addons.fieldservice_sale.tests.test_fsm_sale_order.TestFSMSaleOrder._isp_account_installed
documentation:
Checks if module is installed which will require more
logic for the tests.
:return Boolean indicating the installed status of the module

methods.name: odoo.addons.fieldservice_sale.tests.test_fsm_sale_order.TestFSMSaleOrder._fulfill_order
documentation:
Extra logic required to fulfill FSM order status and prevent
validation error when attempting to complete the FSM order
:return FSM Order with additional fields set

methods.name: odoo.addons.fieldservice_sale.tests.test_fsm_sale_order.TestFSMSaleOrder.test_sale_order_0
documentation:
Test the sales order 0 flow from sale to invoice.
- One FSM order linked to the Sale Order should be created.
- One Invoice linked to the FSM Order should be created.

methods.name: odoo.addons.fieldservice_sale.tests.test_fsm_sale_order.TestFSMSaleOrder.test_sale_order_1
documentation:
Test the sales order 1 flow from sale to invoice.
- One FSM order linked to the Sale Order should be created.
- One Invoice linked to the FSM Order should be created.

methods.name: odoo.addons.fieldservice_sale.tests.test_fsm_sale_order.TestFSMSaleOrder.test_sale_order_2
documentation:
Test the sales order 2 flow from sale to invoice.
- One FSM order linked to the Sale Order Line should be created.
- The FSM Order should update qty_delivered when completed.
- One Invoice linked to the FSM Order should be created.

methods.name: odoo.addons.fieldservice_sale.tests.test_fsm_sale_order.TestFSMSaleOrder.test_sale_order_3
documentation:
Test sale order 3 flow from sale to invoice.
- An FSM order should be created for each Sale Order Line.
- The FSM Order should update qty_delivered when completed.
- An Invoice linked to each FSM Order should be created.

methods.name: odoo.addons.fieldservice_sale.tests.test_fsm_sale_order.TestFSMSaleOrder.test_sale_order_4
documentation:
Test sale order 4 flow from sale to invoice.
- Two FSM orders linked to the Sale Order Lines should be created.
- One FSM order linked to the Sale Order should be created.
- One Invoices should be created (One for each FSM Order).

methods.name: odoo.addons.fieldservice_sale.tests.test_fsm_sale_order.TestFSMSaleOrder.test_sale_order_5
documentation:
Test ValidationError isn't raised if order line
display_type in ("line_section", "line_note")
